summary: Ceraxia CodeBrigade has a working greenfield pipeline with contracts, role modules, templates, verification, review, reports, memory, coordinated file-set synthesis for source/test sets, mandatory module-by-module synthesis contracts, executable module synthesis, verification-driven module synthesis repair, semantic/domain quality gates for generated source/tests, scenario-plan review for user workflows, and a multi-module sales analytics integration trial. The remaining risk is depth: curated templates/features still provide the baseline source, and arbitrary large project code synthesis needs stronger real-world trials beyond the current generated examples before this objective is complete.

evidence: greenfield_project_brief.schema.json requires project metadata, stack, entrypoints, expected_files, artifact_contract, workspace_policy, definition_of_done, implementation_trace, verification_plan, and dependency_plan
greenfield_project.py validate_greenfield_project_brief enforces the runtime contract
focused_self_test.py test_greenfield_project_brief_schema_tracks_runtime_contract covers schema/runtime sync
requirements.remaining_risk: Schema is still permissive with additionalProperties=true for forward compatibility.

evidence: greenfield_architect.py owns project type inference, template selection, stack, architecture_plan, file_tree_plan, module_contracts, implementation_plan, implementation_trace, and verification_plan
architecture_plan.json, file_tree_plan.json, module_contracts.json, implementation_trace.json, and verification_plan.json are attached as project artifacts
focused_self_test.py test_greenfield_architect_owns_project_brief_and_plan covers the role boundary
requirements.remaining_risk: Stack selection is deterministic with short LLM guidance, not yet a fully exploratory architect for unknown domains.

evidence: greenfield_scaffold_worker.py normalizes paths, writes directories/files, enforces .ceraxia_greenfield_workspace, and blocks unowned nonempty workspaces
greenfield_templates.py provides templates for Python CLI/API/library, Node/Vite, static site, Telegram bot, data tool, and local agent tool
focused_self_test.py covers scaffold writes and unowned workspace blocking
requirements.remaining_risk: Android is intentionally not implemented yet; objective text says Android is later/heavier.

evidence: greenfield_implementation_worker.py owns build_implementation_worker_plan and build_implementation_trace as a separate role module

greenfield_architect.py delegates module_sequence, milestones, synthesis_policy, per-module code_synthesis_contract, anti_stub_policy, source_files, test_files, and model guidance into GreenfieldImplementationWorker

greenfield_implementation_worker.py execute_file_set_synthesis_contract can apply a coordinated model-generated source/test file set after validating allowed paths, requirements, placeholders, and workspace boundaries

greenfield_implementation_worker.py execute_module_synthesis_contracts calls the GreenfieldImplementationWorker model path per module and writes source only after JSON, path, requirement, test, placeholder, and workspace validation
greenfield_implementation_worker.py generated_file_quality rejects weak generated Python source and assertionless generated tests before writing model output
greenfield_implementation_worker.py domain_specific_quality_findings adds template-aware checks for FastAPI, frontend, Telegram bot, data processing, and local agent tool outputs
greenfield_implementation_worker.py paired_tests_for_module keeps module requirement traces tied to direct, keyword, or workflow tests instead of every project test
greenfield_scenario_worker.py builds scenario_plan rows from task-derived acceptance features and GreenfieldReview blocks missing behavior markers
greenfield_verification_worker.py can call verification_repair module synthesis with failure context when bounded template repair is not applicable

greenfield_feature_worker.py applies task-derived feature implementations for calculator, todo, notes API, issue tracker API, CSV summary, sales analytics pipeline, local agent tool, Telegram bot, Vite counter, and text utils library
focused_self_test.py test_project_creation_sales_analytics_pipeline_implements_multi_workflow_feature verifies a five-module data project with load/filter/group/report/CLI workflows
focused_self_test.py test_project_creation_issue_tracker_api_implements_multi_workflow_feature verifies a five-module API service with domain/store/routes/app/tests workflows
focused_self_test.py test_greenfield_implementation_trace_uses_precise_workflow_tests proves multi-module source contracts pair with the relevant workflow test
implementation_trace.json records requirement to file/function/test mapping with synthesis_contract_kind and GreenfieldReview checks it
requirements.remaining_risk: Implementation now has executable validated LLM file-set synthesis, module synthesis, verification-driven synthesis repair, semantic/domain quality gates, scenario scoring, and one multi-workflow integration trial, but curated feature overrides/templates still provide the reliable baseline; arbitrary large code synthesis still needs additional long-form real-world integration trials.

evidence: greenfield_dependency_worker.py reads stack dependency_plan, checks package manager availability, records manifests with ecosystem/sha/status, blocks unsafe install paths, records lockfile snapshots, and reports blockers
focused_self_test.py covers Node manifest recording and workspace escape install blocking
requirements.remaining_risk: Install execution remains explicit/allowlisted by design; default behavior records manifests without installing.

evidence: greenfield_verification_worker.py runs verification, calls GreenfieldRepairWorker guidance, applies bounded repairs, reruns, and records stop_condition_evidence
focused_self_test.py covers missing template file repair and repeated failure stop condition
requirements.remaining_risk: Repair execution is intentionally bounded to missing generated files and README command repair; deeper semantic repair is still future work.

evidence: greenfield_review_worker.py checks expected files, README run/test commands, entrypoints, dependency status, verification status, module contracts, placeholders, source/test presence, and implementation_trace
greenfield_review_worker.py includes scenario_review from greenfield_scenario_worker.py and blocks projects whose declared workflows lack source/test evidence
focused_self_test.py covers placeholder blocking and semantic review status
requirements.remaining_risk: Generated artifact meaning is checked by contract, semantic, domain, and scenario heuristics, not a deep domain-specific reviewer for every possible application.

evidence: greenfield_templates.py registers python_cli_basic, python_fastapi_service, python_library, node_vite_app, static_site, telegram_bot_python, data_processing_tool, and local_agent_tool
focused_self_test.py test_greenfield_project_brief_contract_and_templates validates the full template set
requirements.remaining_risk: Templates are intentionally compact; larger domain templates should be added as Ceraxia learns.

evidence: greenfield_architect.py request_greenfield_model_guidance calls model_brain for GreenfieldArchitect and GreenfieldImplementationWorker
greenfield_implementation_worker.py emits per-module code_synthesis_contract objects that define model_request, JSON output fields, validation_gates, and rollback_scope
greenfield_project.py executes a GreenfieldImplementationWorker coordinated file-set synthesis stage and records greenfield_file_set_synthesis_report.json
greenfield_project.py executes GreenfieldImplementationWorker module synthesis before dependency and verification, and records greenfield_module_synthesis_report.json
greenfield_verification_worker.py passes verification failure signatures and results into GreenfieldImplementationWorker synthesis repair
greenfield_review_worker.py calls model guidance for GreenfieldReviewer
greenfield_verification_worker.py calls model guidance for GreenfieldRepairWorker
greenfield_project.py writes greenfield_model_guidance_ledger.json so each run records role, stage, and guidance status
requirements.remaining_risk: LLM file-set and module code generation are executable and validated with semantic/domain quality gates, but the system still needs real-world scenario coverage before it can rely on arbitrary synthesis as the primary implementation path.

evidence: greenfield_memory_worker.py records stack, dependencies, verification, stop evidence, repaired files, review status, acceptance features, scenario status, and reusable learnings
greenfield_project.py writes greenfield_memory_record.json and greenfield_run_report.json after each run
focused_self_test.py and Ceraxia self tests verify report artifacts
requirements.remaining_risk: Memory is file-based per run; no long-term retrieval/ranking layer is implemented yet.

next_recommended_work: Add more long-form integration trials beyond sales analytics: one API-backed workflow, one frontend workflow, and one local-agent workflow with several modules each.
Add deeper generated artifact review for frontend/API behavior beyond static contract checks.
Add a long-form integration test that creates a larger multi-module app and verifies several independent workflows.
Decide whether Android/game templates belong in this goal now or should remain explicitly deferred.
